testcase.name: test_admin_list_feedback_contains_submission
testcase.error: tests/test_iter_jan2026_beta_stripe_pinochle.py:35: in admin_session assert r.status_code == 200, f"vault-auth failed: {r.status_code} {r.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: vault-auth failed: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","code"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"password":"GlobalVibez_Founder_2025!","totp_code":"000000"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_verify_rejects_invalid_session

failure.message: AssertionError: expected 400/403/404/503 for invalid session, got 500: Internal Server Error assert 500 in (400, 403, 404, 503) + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_iter_jan2026_beta_stripe_pinochle.py:114: in test_verify_rejects_invalid_session assert r.status_code in (400, 403, 404, 503), \ E AssertionError: expected 400/403/404/503 for invalid session, got 500: Internal Server Error E assert 500 in (400, 403, 404, 503) E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
